What You Get

Everything you need to close more land deals — without building it all yourself.

🗺️
Comps & Underwriting
Done-for-you comp reports with estimated resale price, offer price, and supporting sales. Know your numbers before you make the call.
💰
Funding & JV Partnerships
Bring a qualifying contract and we bring the capital. 50/50 profit splits on closed deals — or take an upfront assignment fee.
📣
Marketing & Disposition
We market your deals, find buyers, and move properties. You don't need to manage listings or chase offers.
🤝
Closing Coordination
Our team handles the closing logistics — title, contracts, funding, and coordination — from contract to cash.
🎙️
Pro Community & Live Calls
Deal coaching calls 3x per week, a private operator community, and monthly 1-on-1 time with Robin. Available on Pro.
🗂️
Deal Tools & Templates
Purchase agreements, due diligence checklists, deal calculators, and strategy charts — ready to use on any deal.
How It Works

Three steps to backend support on any deal.

01
Submit Your Deal or Request Comps
Use the portal to submit a property under contract or request a comp report on a deal you're evaluating. Takes minutes.
02
Our Team Reviews the Opportunity
We underwrite the deal within 1–2 business days. If it qualifies, we bring capital, marketing, and closing support to the table.
03
Move Forward and Get Paid
Choose JV (50/50 split on close) or Assignment (upfront fee). We execute — you collect.

FAQ

Common questions about the portal.

How do comp tokens work? ›
Each token gives you one full property comp report researched and delivered by our team. Reports include an estimated resale price, recommended offer price, 3–5 supporting sales, and market guidance. You can buy tokens in bundles of 5, 15, or 30.
What deals qualify for backend support? ›
Deals must be under contract (signed PSA), have legal or physical road access, show $40,000+ net profit potential, and be priced below 60% of realistic resale value. If your deal meets all four criteria, submit it and we'll review within 1–2 business days.
What's the difference between a JV and an assignment? ›
A JV (joint venture) means we partner on the deal — we fund, market, and close it, then split the net profit 50/50 when it sells. An assignment means you assign us the contract and we pay you 5–10% of the purchase price upfront, typically within 30 days — no waiting on resale.
What's included in Pro membership? ›
Pro includes everything in Core plus deal coaching calls three times per week, live Comps Calls every Tuesday and Thursday, full training library access, Skool community access, and a monthly one-on-one call with Robin. It's built for operators who want to scale, not just close one deal.
Is the portal free to use? ›
Yes. Creating an account is free. You can submit deals, purchase comp tokens as needed, and access deal tools and templates at no monthly cost. Pro is a paid upgrade for operators who want live coaching, training, and community access.

Deal Submission Hub

Let us help you close bigger, faster.

Capital, marketing, and dispo are already built in. Bring us a qualifying contract and we handle the rest — you focus on finding great deals.

1–2 days
Review turnaround
50/50
JV profit split

$40K+
Min. profit target
▶️
Watch This First
How deal partnerships work, what qualifies, and how to fast-track your next JV or assignment
▶
Deal Partnership Walkthrough · ~6 min
💼 How Our Deals Work
🤝
JV Deals
50/50 Net Profit Split

You bring the contract — we bring the capital, marketing, sales, and closing. Once it sells, we split the net profit right down the middle.

Our Capital Our Marketing We Close You Get Paid
📃
Assignments
5–10% of Purchase Price

Assign us the contract and we handle the close. You get paid 5–10% of the purchase price — typically within 30 days, no waiting on resale.

Fast Payout ~30 Days No Resale Wait
✅ Deal Criteria

To qualify for backend support, your deal must meet all four of the following:

1
Under Contract
Signed PSA or equivalent required before submission
2
Legal or Physical Road Access
No landlocked parcels — access must be confirmed
3
$40,000+ Net Profit Potential
Minimum profit threshold on exit to qualify
4
LTV Below 60%
Purchase price must be under 60% of realistic resale value
These criteria protect your time, our capital, and ensure every deal is aligned for profit and velocity.
📝
Submit a Deal

Fill out the submission form completely. The more detail you include, the faster our team can evaluate and respond.

Takes about 5–10 minutes · Response within 1–2 business days
📊 What Happens Next
1
Review Process
Our team reviews your deal within 1–2 business days
2
Approval & Partnership
If approved, we invite you to assign or enter a JV
3
Full Service Execution
We underwrite, fund, market, and close the deal
4
Get Paid
JV: paid on resale  ·  Assignment: paid upfront
This is backend leverage — built so you can focus on finding great deals, not chasing closings.
Comps Hub

Not sure what a property is actually worth? This is where you fix that. Two powerful tools — one for fast answers, one for building the skill — both built around closing more deals.

Comps Service
Done-for-You, On Demand

Submit a deal using your token balance and our team returns a full comp report — fast. Used across 25,000+ land deals. Built for clarity and speed.

What you get with each report
✓ Estimated resale price
✓ Recommended offer price
✓ 3–5 supporting sales with links
✓ Market insights & call guidance
Your balance: 3 tokens

Comps Calls

✓ Bring your deals — get live comps & feedback
✓ Watch experts comp submissions in real time
✓ Ask questions on values, land comps, underwriting
Ideal for

📄 Open Google Docs Template

Visual frameworks to map exit strategies and development potential
